description: Built-in vulnerability database for Sentinel security scanning. Contains known unsafe package versions maintained by the Sentinel project. Updated with real CVE data.

vulnerabilities.description: SQL injection vulnerability in Django ORM when using crafted column aliases
Cross-site scripting vulnerability in Flask debug view
Information disclosure via improper handling of proxy credentials
Arbitrary code execution via unsafe yaml.load()
Buffer overflow vulnerability in cryptography library
Remote code execution vulnerability in Pillow image processing
Cross-site scripting vulnerability in Jinja2 template rendering
Arbitrary code execution via unsafe pickle deserialization in numpy.load() when loading untrusted .npy or .npz files
Information disclosure: Ansible may fail to honor ANSIBLE_NO_LOG settings, exposing sensitive data in logs
Server-side request forgery vulnerability in botocore's EndpointResolver which boto3 depends on
Race condition in paramiko's private key file creation could allow unauthorized information disclosure
redis-py leaves a connection open after canceling an async Redis command, potentially leading to resource exhaustion
Command injection vulnerability in Celery: backend metadata/messages were trusted by default, allowing malicious task execution
Authorization headers not properly removed during cross-domain redirects in Scrapy, leading to credential leakage
Open redirect vulnerability in Tornado allowing remote attackers to redirect users to arbitrary websites
